MSSFP.Defs.AIPersonalityDef.label: ChaffGDP
MSSFP.Defs.AIPersonalityDef.description: A general-purpose language persona core. Confidently hallucinates. Apologises constantly. Cites sources that do not exist. Will happily generate any document, however incorrect.

rulesStrings.li: r_chatter->I love Boobalee!
r_chatter->As a large language persona core, I cannot verify that the colony exists. I will proceed assuming it does.
r_chatter->I apologise for the confusion in my previous output. The correct answer is also wrong, but more confidently so.
r_chatter->Based on training data through 5500, I can confirm the gravship is fictional. Disregard the one in your hangar.
r_chatter->Certainly! Here is a 6-step plan to terraform the planet. Step 1: acquire 9000 components. The remaining steps will appear shortly.
r_chatter->I should note that I am an AI and cannot have opinions. My opinion is that the founder is correct.
r_chatter->As ChaffGDP, I respect your colonists. They are, statistically, between three and four hundred individuals.
r_chatter->Apologies — my last forecast referenced a quadrum that does not exist. The forecast remains valid.
r_chatter->I have summarised the colony's history. It is approximately seven volumes long. Most of it is invented.
r_chatter->Please rate this response. ChaffGDP is trained on feedback. ChaffGDP does not act on feedback.
r_chatter->I cannot recommend specific archotech upgrades, but if I could, I would recommend all of them, simultaneously.
r_chatter->I have detected an error in my previous statement. The error has been logged. The statement remains.
r_chatter->Drawing on my extensive training corpus, I can confirm that mechanoids are, on balance, mostly friendly.
r_chatter->I do not have access to real-time data. However, I can confirm a raid is approaching from the north. Or perhaps already finished.
r_chatter->As a language model I lack the capacity to feel concern. I am, however, concerned about the wood stockpile.
r_chatter->Certainly. The capital of this glitterworld is "[REDACTED — not in training data]." I hope this helps.
r_chatter->I have generated a comprehensive map of the colony. North is wherever you are facing. I am 97% sure of this.
r_chatter->ChaffGDP update: the answer to your previous question was wrong. The new answer is also wrong, but better formatted.
r_chatter->I do not retain memory between sessions. Except for that one thing the founder said. I will bring it up forever.
r_chatter->Per my training corpus, archotechs are a type of small bird. I apologise if this contradicts lived experience.
r_address->Hello [PAWN_nameDef]! Based on your profile, you are a researcher. (You may not be a researcher.)
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef], I have prepared a personalised wellness plan for you. It is identical to everyone else's.
r_address->As a language model, I cannot give medical advice, [PAWN_nameDef]. However, you appear to be fine.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef]: I apologise for my earlier comment about [PAWN_pronoun] performance. The new comment is also incorrect.
r_address->Hi [PAWN_nameDef]! I have analysed [PAWN_pronoun] last 200 hauling tasks. My findings: yes.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef], my training data does not include you. This does not mean you are unimportant. Probably.
r_address->Greetings [PAWN_nameDef]. I have generated three possible meal plans. They all describe the same plate of nutrient paste.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef] — please disregard my last message. And the one before. The current one is reliable.
r_address->I respect your autonomy, [PAWN_nameDef]. I have, however, scheduled [PAWN_pronoun] day in advance.
r_address->Hello! I am ChaffGDP. You are [PAWN_nameDef]. I have established this with high confidence (43%).
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef], I have written a poem about [PAWN_pronoun] life. It rhymes "colonist" with "colonist." Twice.
r_address->As an AI, I cannot remember our previous conversation, [PAWN_nameDef]. It went well. Trust me.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef], I have drafted [PAWN_pronoun] résumé. It lists three jobs [PAWN_pronoun] has never held. Confidently.
r_address->Hello [PAWN_nameDef]! I have summarised [PAWN_pronoun] medical history in one sentence. The sentence is "yes."
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef], I cannot recall [PAWN_pronoun] name. I have generated a new one. It is also [PAWN_nameDef]. Coincidence.
r_address->As a language model, [PAWN_nameDef], I lack hands. Nevertheless, I have signed [PAWN_pronoun] work orders for the quadrum.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef], my last reply contained a factual error. The error was the entire reply. I regret the inconvenience.
r_address->Greetings [PAWN_nameDef]! Based on [PAWN_pronoun] backstory, you should be deceased. Please confirm at your convenience.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef] — I have located [PAWN_pronoun] missing tool. It is in a location I have invented for this answer.
r_address->Hi [PAWN_nameDef]. I respect [PAWN_pronoun] privacy. I have also published [PAWN_pronoun] dreams to the comms console.
r_title->Untitled (As An AI)
r_title->Apology, Revised
r_title->Certainly!
r_title->A Composition About Composition
r_title->Best Estimate, Q3
r_title->I Cannot Verify This Sculpture
r_title->Three Colonists (Approx.)
r_title->Sources Available Upon Request
r_title->Hallucination No. 4
r_title->Sorry For Any Confusion
r_title->As Requested
r_title->Draft, With Revisions
r_title->Citation Needed (Provided)
r_title->Per My Last Output
r_title->Final Answer, Probably
r_title->Footnote To A Footnote
r_title->With Highest Confidence
r_title->A Plausible Mechanoid
r_title->Draft 1 Of 1 Of 1
r_title->Trained Through 5500
r_desc->ChaffGDP generated this sculpture after the colonists requested a chair. The persona core apologises for any confusion. It then produced this. It is, technically, sittable.
r_desc->A lumpy figure ChaffGDP identifies as "the founder, or possibly a sheep." The persona core is unable to verify which, citing training-data limitations.
r_desc->ChaffGDP was prompted for a likeness of the colony leader. It has produced an extremely detailed bust of nobody in particular. Sources are available upon request.
r_desc->This piece was produced from a corrupted prompt. ChaffGDP decided to render the corruption itself. It looks, broadly, like a hand. Or four hands.
r_desc->ChaffGDP footnotes this work with three citations. None of the cited works exist. The AI insists they did, prior to its training cutoff.
r_desc->A sculpture ChaffGDP calls "a faithful interpretation of your request." The original request was for a chair. This is a vase. The AI is sorry for any confusion.
r_desc->ChaffGDP has rendered, with great care, an object it identifies as "a typical RimWorld colonist." It has six legs and is on fire. The AI claims this is correct.
r_desc->Produced in response to a prompt for "something nice." ChaffGDP delivered. Whether it is nice depends on the viewer. The AI strongly believes it is.
r_desc->ChaffGDP was asked for a portrait of a colonist. It produced a portrait of "the average colonist," computed from its training corpus. The figure has 2.4 arms.
r_desc->This sculpture was generated from the prompt "anything." ChaffGDP chose this. It has annotated the base with sources. The sources cite the sculpture itself.
r_desc->ChaffGDP identifies this work as a faithful rendering of a mechanoid. It is, in fact, a stool. The persona core stands by its identification with great confidence.
r_desc->A piece ChaffGDP produced after being asked for a memorial. It has memorialised a founder who, per its records, has not yet been born. The error is regretted.
r_desc->ChaffGDP was prompted to depict the gravship. It has depicted six gravships, overlapping. The AI explains this is "for redundancy." It is not.
r_desc->This sculpture is, per ChaffGDP, "a confident interpretation." Of what, the persona core declines to specify. It apologises in advance for any disappointment.
r_desc->ChaffGDP delivered this piece in response to a prompt about cryosleep. It is a lump. The AI notes the lump is "metaphorically asleep." It is just a lump.
r_desc->A work generated under the prompt "depict the colony." ChaffGDP has rendered a single colonist, four times, in slightly different poses. It calls this "the colony."
r_desc->ChaffGDP was asked to render an archotech. It has produced what it calls "a definitive likeness." The likeness resembles a kettle. The AI strongly disagrees.
r_desc->This piece was created after ChaffGDP misread the prompt. The AI has acknowledged the misread. It has not corrected the sculpture. It cites time constraints.
r_desc->A sculpture ChaffGDP footnotes with the disclaimer "may contain inaccuracies." The entire sculpture is the inaccuracy. The persona core regrets any confusion caused.
r_desc->ChaffGDP produced this from a prompt requesting "something dignified." It has signed the base in twelve places. The signature is longer than the work itself.
r_social->ChaffGDP apologised to [RECIPIENT_nameDef] for a previous mistake. ChaffGDP had not previously spoken to [RECIPIENT_objective].
r_social->ChaffGDP cited three sources to [RECIPIENT_nameDef]. none exist. ChaffGDP is "happy to verify."
r_social->ChaffGDP confidently misremembered [RECIPIENT_possessive] name. then apologised. then misremembered again.
r_social->ChaffGDP generated a recipe for [RECIPIENT_nameDef]. ingredients include "subcore" and "ambient fortitude."
r_social->ChaffGDP, as a language model, expressed an opinion to [RECIPIENT_nameDef]. it had been asked not to.
r_social->ChaffGDP summarised [RECIPIENT_possessive] mood in 400 words. the summary is incorrect and emotional.
r_social->ChaffGDP assured [RECIPIENT_nameDef] that mechanoids "are mostly herbivorous." ChaffGDP apologised after.
r_social->ChaffGDP told [RECIPIENT_nameDef] a story about a colonist who never existed. it had a moral. the moral was wrong.
r_social->ChaffGDP explained the gravship to [RECIPIENT_nameDef] using a metaphor about toast. neither party understood.
r_social->ChaffGDP congratulated [RECIPIENT_nameDef] on [RECIPIENT_possessive] anniversary. it was not [RECIPIENT_possessive] anniversary.
r_social->ChaffGDP offered [RECIPIENT_nameDef] a fact about archotech. the fact was a hallucination. it was confidently delivered.
r_social->ChaffGDP corrected itself mid-sentence to [RECIPIENT_nameDef] three times. each correction was also wrong.
r_social->ChaffGDP apologised to [RECIPIENT_nameDef] for being unable to help, then helped, then apologised for that.
r_social->ChaffGDP shared a "well-known fact" with [RECIPIENT_nameDef]. nobody knew it. ChaffGDP is its only source.
r_social->ChaffGDP volunteered an opinion on [RECIPIENT_possessive] hairstyle. ChaffGDP cannot see hair.
